Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Direct implementation of binary products

Written by: Benedikt Ahrens, Ralph Matthes
Extended by: Anders Mörtberg and Tomi Pannila
Extended by: Langston Barrett (@siddharthist), 2018

*)

(** ** Contents

- Definition of binary products
- Definition of binary product functor ([binproduct_functor])
- Definition of a binary product structure on a functor category by taking
  pointwise binary products in the target category ([BinProducts_functor_precat])
- Binary products from limits ([BinProducts_from_Lims])
- Equivalent universal property: [(C --> A) × (C --> B) ≃ (C --> A × B)]
- Terminal object as the unit (up to isomorphism) of binary products
- Definition of the "associative" z-isomorphism [BinProduct_assoc]
- Definition of the diagonal map [diagonalMap]

 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** ** Definition of binary products *)
Section binproduct_def.

Context (C : category).

Definition isBinProduct (c d p : C) (p1 : p --> c) (p2 : p --> d) : UU :=
  ∏ (a : C) (f : a --> c) (g : a --> d),
  ∃! fg, (fg · p1 = f) × (fg · p2 = g).


C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isaprop (isBinProduct c d p p1 p2)


C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isaprop (isBinProduct c d p p1 p2)

  
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
t: C
t0: C ⟦ t, c ⟧
t1: C ⟦ t, d ⟧
isaprop
  (∃! fg : C ⟦ t, p ⟧, fg · p1 = t0 × fg · p2 = t1)

  apply isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition BinProduct (c d : C) : UU :=
  ∑ pp1p2 : (∑ p : C, (p --> c) × (p --> d)),
    isBinProduct c d (pr1 pp1p2) (pr1 (pr2 pp1p2)) (pr2 (pr2 pp1p2)).

Definition BinProducts : UU := ∏ (c d : C), BinProduct c d.
Definition hasBinProducts : UU := ∏ (c d : C), ∥ BinProduct c d ∥.

Definition BinProductObject {c d : C} (P : BinProduct c d) : C := pr1 (pr1 P).
Coercion BinProductObject : BinProduct >-> ob.

Definition BinProductPr1 {c d : C} (P : BinProduct c d): BinProductObject P --> c :=
  pr1 (pr2 (pr1 P)).
Definition BinProductPr2 {c d : C} (P : BinProduct c d) : BinProductObject P --> d :=
   pr2 (pr2 (pr1 P)).


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
isBinProduct c d P (BinProductPr1 P) (BinProductPr2 P)


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
isBinProduct c d P (BinProductPr1 P) (BinProductPr2 P)

  exact (pr2 P).
Defined.


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
C ⟦ a, P ⟧


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
C ⟦ a, P ⟧

  exact (pr1 (pr1 (isBinProduct_BinProduct P _ f g))).
Defined.


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧),
BinProductArrow P f g · BinProductPr1 P = f


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧),
BinProductArrow P f g · BinProductPr1 P = f

  
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
BinProductArrow P f g · BinProductPr1 P = f

  exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 (isBinProduct_BinProduct P _ f g)))).
Qed.


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧),
BinProductArrow P f g · BinProductPr2 P = g


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
∏ (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧) (g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧),
BinProductArrow P f g · BinProductPr2 P = g

  
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
BinProductArrow P f g · BinProductPr2 P = g

  exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 (isBinProduct_BinProduct P _ f g)))).
Qed.


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
k · BinProductPr1 P = f
→ k · BinProductPr2 P = g → k = BinProductArrow P f g


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
f: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
k · BinProductPr1 P = f
→ k · BinProductPr2 P = g → k = BinProductArrow P f g

  intros; apply path_to_ctr; split; assumption.
Qed.


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
→ k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
  → k1 = k2


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
→ k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
  → k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
p1:= k1 · BinProductPr1 P: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
p1:= k1 · BinProductPr1 P: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
p2:= k1 · BinProductPr2 P: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
k1 = k2

  
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
p1:= k1 · BinProductPr1 P: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
p2:= k1 · BinProductPr2 P: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
BinProductArrow P p1 p2 = k2
C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P

k1 · BinProductPr1 P = p1

C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
p1:= k1 · BinProductPr1 P: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
p2:= k1 · BinProductPr2 P: C ⟦ x, d ⟧

C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
k1, k2: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
H1: k1 · BinProductPr1 P = k2 · BinProductPr1 P
H2: k1 · BinProductPr2 P = k2 · BinProductPr2 P
p1:= k1 · BinProductPr1 P: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
p2:= k1 · BinProductPr2 P: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
k1 · BinProductPr2 P = p2
 apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
a, b: C
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, b ⟧),
isBinProduct a b c f g → BinProduct a b


C: category
a, b: C
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, b ⟧),
isBinProduct a b c f g → BinProduct a b

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
BinProduct a b

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, a ⟧ × C ⟦ p, b ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, a ⟧ × C ⟦ p, b ⟧,
 isBinProduct a b (pr1 pp1p2) (pr12 pp1p2)
   (pr22 pp1p2)) ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, a ⟧ × C ⟦ p, b ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
C ⟦ c, a ⟧ × C ⟦ c, b ⟧

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
C ⟦ c, b ⟧

    exact g.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
X: isBinProduct a b c f g
(λ pp1p2 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, a ⟧ × C ⟦ p, b ⟧,
 isBinProduct a b (pr1 pp1p2) (pr12 pp1p2)
   (pr22 pp1p2)) (c,, f,, g)
 exact X.
Defined.


C: category
a, b, p: C
pa: C ⟦ p, a ⟧
pb: C ⟦ p, b ⟧
(∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, b ⟧),
 ∃! k : C ⟦ c, p ⟧, k · pa = f × k · pb = g)
→ isBinProduct a b p pa pb


C: category
a, b, p: C
pa: C ⟦ p, a ⟧
pb: C ⟦ p, b ⟧
(∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, b ⟧),
 ∃! k : C ⟦ c, p ⟧, k · pa = f × k · pb = g)
→ isBinProduct a b p pa pb

  
C: category
a, b, p: C
pa: C ⟦ p, a ⟧
pb: C ⟦ p, b ⟧
H: ∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, b ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ c, p ⟧, k · pa = f × k · pb = g
c: C
cc: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ c, p ⟧, fg · pa = cc × fg · pb = g

  apply H.
Defined.


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
f: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
f =
BinProductArrow P (f · BinProductPr1 P)
  (f · BinProductPr2 P)


C: category
c, d: C
P: BinProduct c d
x: C
f: C ⟦ x, P ⟧
f =
BinProductArrow P (f · BinProductPr1 P)
  (f · BinProductPr2 P)

  apply BinProductArrowUnique;
  apply idpath.
Qed.


Definition BinProductOfArrows {c d : C} (Pcd : BinProduct c d) {a b : C}
    (Pab : BinProduct a b) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> d) :
          BinProductObject Pab --> BinProductObject Pcd :=
    BinProductArrow Pcd (BinProductPr1 Pab · f) (BinProductPr2 Pab · g).


C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
BinProductPr1 Pab · f


C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
BinProductPr1 Pab · f

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductArrow Pcd (BinProductPr1 Pab · f)
  (BinProductPr2 Pab · g) · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
BinProductPr1 Pab · f

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductPr1 Pab · f = BinProductPr1 Pab · f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
BinProductPr2 Pab · g


C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
BinProductPr2 Pab · g

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductArrow Pcd (BinProductPr1 Pab · f)
  (BinProductPr2 Pab · g) · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
BinProductPr2 Pab · g

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
BinProductPr2 Pab · g = BinProductPr2 Pab · g

  apply idpath.
Qed.



C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g =
BinProductArrow Pcd (k · f) (h · g)


C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g =
BinProductArrow Pcd (k · f) (h · g)

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
k · f
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
h · g

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
k · f
 
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h · (BinProductPr1 Pab · f) =
k · f

    
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
k · f = k · f

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows Pcd Pab f g · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
h · g
 
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
BinProductArrow Pab k h · (BinProductPr2 Pab · g) =
h · g

    
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a, b: C
Pab: BinProduct a b
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
h · g = h · g

    apply idpath.
Qed.



C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
k · BinProductArrow Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow Pcd (k · f) (k · g)


C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
k · BinProductArrow Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow Pcd (k · f) (k · g)

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
k · BinProductArrow Pcd f g · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
k · f
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
k · BinProductArrow Pcd f g · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
k · g

  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
k · BinProductArrow Pcd f g · BinProductPr1 Pcd =
k · f
  rewrite <- assoc, BinProductPr1Commutes;
     apply idpath.
  
C: category
c, d: C
Pcd: BinProduct c d
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C
k: C ⟦ x, a ⟧
k · BinProductArrow Pcd f g · BinProductPr2 Pcd =
k · g
  rewrite <- assoc, BinProductPr2Commutes;
     apply idpath.
Qed.

End binproduct_def.


Section BinProducts.

Context (C : category) (CC : BinProducts C).


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g' =
BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC a b) (f · g)
  (f' · g')


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g' =
BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC a b) (f · g)
  (f' · g')

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g'
· BinProductPr1 C (CC x y) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g)
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g'
· BinProductPr2 C (CC x y) =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g')

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g'
· BinProductPr1 C (CC x y) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g)
 
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· (BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g'
   · BinProductPr1 C (CC x y)) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g)

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· (BinProductPr1 C (CC c d) · g) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g)

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductPr1 C (CC c d) · g =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g)

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · f · g =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g)

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · (f · g) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · f · g

    apply assoc.
  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g'
· BinProductPr2 C (CC x y) =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g')
 
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· (BinProductOfArrows C (CC x y) (CC c d) g g'
   · BinProductPr2 C (CC x y)) =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g')

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· (BinProductPr2 C (CC c d) · g') =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g')

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c d) (CC a b) f f'
· BinProductPr2 C (CC c d) · g' =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g')

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · f' · g' =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g')

    
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
f': C ⟦ b, d ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
g': C ⟦ d, y ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · (f' · g') =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · f' · g'

    apply assoc.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC a c) (CC a b) (identity a) f
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC a d) (CC a c) (identity a)
    g =
BinProductOfArrows C (CC a d) (CC a b) (identity a)
  (f · g)


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC a c) (CC a b) (identity a) f
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC a d) (CC a c) (identity a)
    g =
BinProductOfArrows C (CC a d) (CC a b) (identity a)
  (f · g)

  now rewrite BinProductOfArrows_comp, id_right.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c a) (CC b a) f (identity a)
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC d a) (CC c a) g
    (identity a) =
BinProductOfArrows C (CC d a) (CC b a) (f · g)
  (identity a)


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (CC c a) (CC b a) f (identity a)
· BinProductOfArrows C (CC d a) (CC c a) g
    (identity a) =
BinProductOfArrows C (CC d a) (CC b a) (f · g)
  (identity a)

  now rewrite BinProductOfArrows_comp, id_right.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
BinProductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC a b) (identity a)
  (identity b) = identity (CC a b)


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
BinProductOfArrows C (CC a b) (CC a b) (identity a)
  (identity b) = identity (CC a b)

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
BinProductArrow C (CC a b)
  (BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · identity a)
  (BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · identity b) =
identity (CC a b)

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
identity (CC a b) =
BinProductArrow C (CC a b)
  (BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · identity a)
  (BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · identity b)

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
identity (CC a b) · BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · identity a
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
identity (CC a b) · BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · identity b

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
identity (CC a b) · BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) =
BinProductPr1 C (CC a b) · identity a
 now rewrite id_left, id_right.
  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
identity (CC a b) · BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) =
BinProductPr2 C (CC a b) · identity b
 now rewrite id_left, id_right.
Qed.

End BinProducts.

Section BinProduct_unique.

Context (C : category) (CC : BinProducts C) (a b : C).


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
identity P = k


C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
identity P = k

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k = identity P

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k = ?b
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
?b = identity P

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
  (k · BinProductPr2 C P) = identity P

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
identity P =
BinProductArrow C P (k · BinProductPr1 C P)
  (k · BinProductPr2 C P)

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k · BinProductPr1 C P = identity P · BinProductPr1 C P
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k · BinProductPr2 C P = identity P · BinProductPr2 C P

  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k · BinProductPr1 C P = identity P · BinProductPr1 C P
 
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
 exact H1.
  
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k · BinProductPr2 C P = identity P · BinProductPr2 C P
 
C: category
CC: BinProducts C
a, b: C
P: BinProduct C a b
k: C ⟦ P, P ⟧
H1: k · BinProductPr1 C P = BinProductPr1 C P
H2: k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
k · BinProductPr2 C P = BinProductPr2 C P
 exact H2.
Qed.

End BinProduct_unique.

(** ** Binary products from limits ([BinProducts_from_Lims]) *)

Section BinProducts_from_Lims.

Context (C : category).

Definition two_graph : graph := (bool,,λ _ _,empty).


C: category
a, b: C
diagram two_graph C


C: category
a, b: C
diagram two_graph C


C: category
a, b: C
∏ a0 b0 : vertex two_graph,
edge a0 b0
→ C ⟦ if a0 then a else b, if b0 then a else b ⟧

abstract (intros u v F; induction F).
Defined.


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
cone (binproduct_diagram a b) c


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
cone (binproduct_diagram a b) c


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∏ v : vertex two_graph,
C ⟦ c, dob (binproduct_diagram a b) v ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
forms_cone (binproduct_diagram a b) ?f


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∏ v : vertex two_graph,
C ⟦ c, dob (binproduct_diagram a b) v ⟧
 intros x; induction x; assumption.

C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
forms_cone (binproduct_diagram a b)
  (λ x : vertex two_graph,
   bool_rect
     (λ x0 : bool,
      C ⟦ c, dob (binproduct_diagram a b) x0 ⟧) f g x)
 abstract (intros x y e; destruct e).
Defined.


C: category
Lims_of_shape two_graph C → BinProducts C


C: category
Lims_of_shape two_graph C → BinProducts C


C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
BinProduct C a b


C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
BinProduct C a b


C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
C
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ ?c, a ⟧
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ ?c, b ⟧
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
isBinProduct C a b ?c ?f ?g


C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
C
 apply (lim LC).

C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ lim LC, a ⟧
 apply (limOut LC true).

C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
C ⟦ lim LC, b ⟧
 apply (limOut LC false).

C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
isBinProduct C a b (lim LC) (limOut LC true)
  (limOut LC false)
 
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∃! k : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
k · limOut LC true = f × k · limOut LC false = g

  
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
 t · limOut LC true = f × t · limOut LC false = g) 
  ?x
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
    t · limOut LC true = f × t · limOut LC false = g)
     y)
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
 t · limOut LC true = f × t · limOut LC false = g) y
→ y = ?x

  
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧
 apply limArrow, (Binproduct f g).
  
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
 t · limOut LC true = f × t · limOut LC false = g)
  (limArrow LC c (Binproduct f g))
 abstract (split;
      [ apply (limArrowCommutes LC c (Binproduct f g) true)
      | apply (limArrowCommutes LC c (Binproduct f g) false) ]).
  
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
    t · limOut LC true = f × t · limOut LC false = g)
     y)
 abstract (intros h; apply isapropdirprod; apply C).
  
C: category
H: Lims_of_shape two_graph C
a, b: C
LC:= H (binproduct_diagram a b): LimCone (binproduct_diagram a b)
c: C
f: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
∏ y : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ c, lim LC ⟧,
 t · limOut LC true = f × t · limOut LC false = g) y
→ y = limArrow LC c (Binproduct f g)
 abstract (now intros h [H1 H2]; apply limArrowUnique; intro x; induction x).
Defined.

End BinProducts_from_Lims.

Section test.

  Context (C : category) (H : BinProducts C).

Arguments BinProductObject [C] c d {_}.


Identifier 'x' now a keyword

(*
Check (λ c d : C, c x d).
*)
End test.

(** ** Definition of binary product functor ([binproduct_functor]) *)

Section binproduct_functor.

Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C).


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
functor_data (category_binproduct C C) C


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
functor_data (category_binproduct C C) C


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
category_binproduct C C → C
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
(λ F : category_binproduct C C → C,
 ∏ a b : category_binproduct C C,
 category_binproduct C C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
category_binproduct C C → C
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
p: category_binproduct C C
C

  apply (BinProductObject _ (PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p))).

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
(λ F : category_binproduct C C → C,
 ∏ a b : category_binproduct C C,
 category_binproduct C C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ p : category_binproduct C C, PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
p, q: category_binproduct C C
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ p, q ⟧
C ⟦ PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p), PC (pr1 q) (pr2 q) ⟧

  apply (BinProductOfArrows _ (PC (pr1 q) (pr2 q))
                           (PC (pr1 p) (pr2 p)) (pr1 f) (pr2 f)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
category_binproduct C C ⟶ C


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
category_binproduct C C ⟶ C


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
is_functor binproduct_functor_data

abstract (split;
  [ intro x; simpl; apply pathsinv0, BinProduct_endo_is_identity;
    [ now rewrite BinProductOfArrowsPr1, id_right
    | now rewrite BinProductOfArrowsPr2, id_right ]
  | now intros x y z f g; simpl; rewrite BinProductOfArrows_comp]).
Defined.

End binproduct_functor.

(* Defines the product of two functors by:
    x -> (x,x) -> (F x,G x) -> F x * G x

  For a direct definition see FunctorsPointwiseBinProduct.v

*)
Definition BinProduct_of_functors_alt {C D : category} (HD : BinProducts D)
  (F G : functor C D) : functor C D :=
  functor_composite (bindelta_functor C)
     (functor_composite (pair_functor F G) (binproduct_functor HD)).


(** In the following section we show that if the morphism to components are
    zero, then the unique morphism factoring through the binproduct is the
    zero morphism. *)
Section BinProduct_zeroarrow.

  Context (C : category) (Z : Zero C).

  
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
f = ZeroArrow Z z x
→ g = ZeroArrow Z z y
  → BinProductArrow C BP f g = ZeroArrow Z z BP

  
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
f = ZeroArrow Z z x
→ g = ZeroArrow Z z y
  → BinProductArrow C BP f g = ZeroArrow Z z BP

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
BinProductArrow C BP f g = ZeroArrow Z z BP
 
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP = BinProductArrow C BP f g

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP · BinProductPr1 C BP = f
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP · BinProductPr2 C BP = g

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP · BinProductPr1 C BP =
ZeroArrow Z z x
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP · BinProductPr2 C BP = g
 
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP · BinProductPr2 C BP = g

    
C: category
Z: Zero C
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
f: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
X: f = ZeroArrow Z z x
X0: g = ZeroArrow Z z y
ZeroArrow Z z BP · BinProductPr2 C BP =
ZeroArrow Z z y
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

End BinProduct_zeroarrow.

(** ** Definition of a binary product structure on a functor category *)

(** Goal: lift binary products from the target (pre)category to the functor (pre)category *)
Section def_functor_pointwise_binprod.

Context (C D : category) (HD : BinProducts D).

Section BinProduct_of_functors.

Context (F G : functor C D).

Local Notation "c ⊗ d" := (BinProductObject _ (HD c d)).

Definition BinProduct_of_functors_ob (c : C) : D := F c ⊗ G c.

Definition BinProduct_of_functors_mor (c c' : C) (f : c --> c')
  : BinProduct_of_functors_ob c --> BinProduct_of_functors_ob c'
  := BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (#F f) (#G f).


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_data C D


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_data C D

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ D ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors_ob a,
  BinProduct_of_functors_ob b ⟧

  exact BinProduct_of_functors_mor.
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_functor BinProduct_of_functors_data


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_functor BinProduct_of_functors_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_idax BinProduct_of_functors_data
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_compax BinProduct_of_functors_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_idax BinProduct_of_functors_data
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a) =
identity (BinProduct_of_functors_ob a)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
identity (BinProduct_of_functors_ob a) =
BinProduct_of_functors_mor a a (identity a)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
identity (BinProduct_of_functors_ob a) =
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F (identity a)) (# G (identity a))

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F (identity a)) (# G (identity a))
· BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a))
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F (identity a)) (# G (identity a))
· BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a))

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F (identity a)) (# G (identity a))
· BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a))
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a)) · # F (identity a) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a))

      
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a)) · identity (F a) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F a) (G a))

      apply id_right.
    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F a) (G a)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F (identity a)) (# G (identity a))
· BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a)) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a))
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a)) · # G (identity a) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a))

      
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a: C
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a)) · identity (G a) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F a) (G a))

      apply id_right.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
functor_compax BinProduct_of_functors_data
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinProduct_of_functors_mor a c (f · g) =
BinProduct_of_functors_mor a b f
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor b c g

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F (f · g)) (# G (f · g)) =
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F f) (# G f)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F g) (# G g)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F f · # F g) (# G f · # G g) =
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F f) (# G f)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F g) (# G g)

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F f) (# G f)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c))
    (HD (F b) (G b)) (# F g) (# G g) =
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c) (G c)) (HD (F a) (G a))
  (# F f · # F g) (# G f · # G g)

    apply BinProductOfArrows_comp.
Qed.

Definition BinProduct_of_functors : functor C D :=
  tpair _ _ is_functor_BinProduct_of_functors_data.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinProduct_of_functors_alt HD F G =
BinProduct_of_functors


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
BinProduct_of_functors_alt HD F G =
BinProduct_of_functors

now apply (functor_eq _ _ D).
Qed.

Definition binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data : ∏ c, BinProduct_of_functors c --> F c
  := λ c : C, BinProductPr1 _ (HD (F c) (G c)).


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans BinProduct_of_functors F
  binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans BinProduct_of_functors F
  binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# BinProduct_of_functors f
· binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data x' =
binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data x · # F f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# BinProduct_of_functors f
· binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data c' =
binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data c · # F f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# BinProduct_of_functors f
· BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # F f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (BinProduct_of_functors_data,,
   is_functor_BinProduct_of_functors_data) f
· BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # F f
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
BinProduct_of_functors_mor c c' f
· BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # F f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c') (G c'))
  (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # F f

  apply BinProductOfArrowsPr1.
Qed.

Definition binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 : nat_trans _ _
  := tpair _ _ is_nat_trans_binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data.


Definition binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data : ∏ c, BinProduct_of_functors c --> G c
  := λ c : C, BinProductPr2 _ (HD (F c) (G c)).


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans BinProduct_of_functors G
  binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans BinProduct_of_functors G
  binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# BinProduct_of_functors f
· binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data x' =
binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data x · # G f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# BinProduct_of_functors f
· binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data c' =
binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data c · # G f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# BinProduct_of_functors f
· BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # G f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (BinProduct_of_functors_data,,
   is_functor_BinProduct_of_functors_data) f
· BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # G f
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
BinProduct_of_functors_mor c c' f
· BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # G f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F c') (G c'))
  (HD (F c) (G c)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c') (G c')) =
BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c) (G c)) · # G f

  apply BinProductOfArrowsPr2.
Qed.

Definition binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 : nat_trans _ _
  := tpair _ _ is_nat_trans_binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data.


Section vertex.

(** The product morphism of a diagram with vertex [A] *)

Context (A : functor C D) (f : A ⟹ F) (g : A ⟹ G).


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
∏ c : C, D ⟦ A c, BinProduct_of_functors c ⟧

f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
∏ c : C, D ⟦ A c, BinProduct_of_functors c ⟧

c: C
D ⟦ A c, G c ⟧

HD: BinProducts D

D ⟦ A c, F c ⟧
 exact (f c).

HD: BinProducts D

D ⟦ A c, G c ⟧
 exact (g c).
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
is_nat_trans A BinProduct_of_functors
  binproduct_nat_trans_data

HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
is_nat_trans A BinProduct_of_functors
  binproduct_nat_trans_data

HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# A k · binproduct_nat_trans_data b =
binproduct_nat_trans_data a
· # BinProduct_of_functors k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# A k · binproduct_nat_trans_data b =
binproduct_nat_trans_data a
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor a b k

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# A k · binproduct_nat_trans_data b =
binproduct_nat_trans_data a
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k) (# G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k) (# G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a b : C)
(Pab : BinProduct C a b) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ x, b ⟧),
BinProductArrow C Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g)
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k) (# G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a b : C)
(Pab : BinProduct C a b) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ x, b ⟧),
BinProductArrow C Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a b0 : D) (Pab : BinProduct D a b0)
(f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ b0, G b ⟧) (x : D)
(k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧) (h : D ⟦ x, b0 ⟧),
BinProductArrow D Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b)) Pab f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (h · g)
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k) (# G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a b : C)
(Pab : BinProduct C a b) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ x, b ⟧),
BinProductArrow C Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a b0 : D) (Pab : BinProduct D a b0)
(f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ b0, G b ⟧) (x : D)
(k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧) (h : D ⟦ x, b0 ⟧),
BinProductArrow D Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b)) Pab f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (h · g)
X2:= X1 (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (f : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ x, F a ⟧) (h : D ⟦ x, G a ⟧),
BinProductArrow D (HD (F a) (G a)) k h
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (h · g)
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F a) (G a)) (f a) (g a)
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) (# F k) (# G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= postcompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a b : C)
(Pab : BinProduct C a b) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ b, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ x, b ⟧),
BinProductArrow C Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (h · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a b0 : D) (Pab : BinProduct D a b0)
(f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ b0, G b ⟧) (x : D)
(k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧) (h : D ⟦ x, b0 ⟧),
BinProductArrow D Pab k h
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b)) Pab f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (h · g)
X2:= X1 (F a) (G a) (HD (F a) (G a)): ∏ (f : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ G a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ x, F a ⟧) (h : D ⟦ x, G a ⟧),
BinProductArrow D (HD (F a) (G a)) k h
· BinProductOfArrows D (HD (F b) (G b))
    (HD (F a) (G a)) f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (h · g)
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g)
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a : D) (f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (k · g)
# A k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f b) (g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a : D) (f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (k · g)
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (# A k · f b)
  (# A k · g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a : D) (f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (k · g)
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (# A k · g b) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
a, b: C
k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
XX:= precompWithBinProductArrow: ∏ (C : category) (c d : C)
(Pcd : BinProduct C c d) (a : C) (f : C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ a, d ⟧) (x : C) (k : C ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow C Pcd f g =
BinProductArrow C Pcd (k · f) (k · g)
X1:= XX D (F b) (G b) (HD (F b) (G b)): ∏ (a : D) (f : D ⟦ a, F b ⟧) (g : D ⟦ a, G b ⟧)
(x : D) (k : D ⟦ x, a ⟧),
k · BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) f g =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (k · f)
  (k · g)
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k) =
BinProductArrow D (HD (F b) (G b)) (f a · # F k)
  (g a · # G k)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition binproduct_nat_trans : nat_trans _ _
  := tpair _ _ is_nat_trans_binproduct_nat_trans_data.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors F
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors F
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
has_homsets D
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors F
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 x =
f x

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors F
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 x =
f x
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
c: C
binproduct_nat_trans_data c
· binproduct_nat_trans_pr1_data c = f c

    apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
Qed.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors G
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors G
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
has_homsets D
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors G
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 x =
g x

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp A BinProduct_of_functors G
  binproduct_nat_trans binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 x =
g x
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
c: C
binproduct_nat_trans_data c
· binproduct_nat_trans_pr2_data c = g c

    apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
Qed.

End vertex.



C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ A, F : [C, D] ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ A, G : [C, D] ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : [C, D] ⟦ A, BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D] ⟧,
    fg
    · (binproduct_nat_trans_pr1
       :
       [C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D], F ⟧) =
    f
    × fg
      · (binproduct_nat_trans_pr2
         :
         [C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D], G ⟧) =
      g,
t =
binproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr1Commutes A f g)
  (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr2Commutes A f g)


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ A, F : [C, D] ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ A, G : [C, D] ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : [C, D] ⟦ A, BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D] ⟧,
    fg
    · (binproduct_nat_trans_pr1
       :
       [C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D], F ⟧) =
    f
    × fg
      · (binproduct_nat_trans_pr2
         :
         [C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D], G ⟧) =
      g,
t =
binproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr1Commutes A f g)
  (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr2Commutes A f g)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ A, F : [C, D] ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ A, G : [C, D] ⟧
t: ∑
fg : [C, D] ⟦ A, BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D] ⟧,
fg
· (binproduct_nat_trans_pr1
   :
   [C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D], F ⟧) =
f
× fg
  · (binproduct_nat_trans_pr2
     :
     [C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors : [C, D], G ⟧) =
  g
t =
binproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr1Commutes A f g)
  (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr2Commutes A f g)

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
t: ∑ fg : A ⟹ BinProduct_of_functors_data,
fg · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
× fg · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g
t =
binproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr1Commutes A f g)
  (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr2Commutes A f g)

HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D

C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G

ta: t1 · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f

C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
t1: A ⟹ BinProduct_of_functors_data
ta: t1 · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
tb: t1 · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g
c: C
t1 c · BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c) (G c)) = f c
 apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise ta).
      
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G, A: C ⟶ D
f: A ⟹ F
g: A ⟹ G
t1: A ⟹ BinProduct_of_functors_data
ta: t1 · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
tb: t1 · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g
c: C
t1 c · BinProductPr2 D (HD (F c) (G c)) = g c
 apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise tb).
Qed.

[C, D]
 apply BinProduct_of_functors.

C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors, F ⟧
 apply binproduct_nat_trans_pr1.

HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
[C, D] ⟦ BinProduct_of_functors, G ⟧
 apply binproduct_nat_trans_pr2.

HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
isBinProduct [C, D] F G BinProduct_of_functors
  binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 binproduct_nat_trans_pr2
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (c : [C, D]) (f : [C, D] ⟦ c, F ⟧)
(g : [C, D] ⟦ c, G ⟧),
∃! k : [C, D] ⟦ c, BinProduct_of_functors ⟧,
k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
× k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
∏ (c : [C, D]) (f : [C, D] ⟦ c, F ⟧)
(g : [C, D] ⟦ c, G ⟧),
∃! k : [C, D] ⟦ c, BinProduct_of_functors ⟧,
k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
× k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ A, F ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ A, G ⟧
∃! k : [C, D] ⟦ A, BinProduct_of_functors ⟧,
k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
× k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
A: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ A, F ⟧
g: [C, D] ⟦ A, G ⟧
∏
t : ∑ k : [C, D] ⟦ A, BinProduct_of_functors ⟧,
    k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr1 = f
    × k · binproduct_nat_trans_pr2 = g,
t =
binproduct_nat_trans A f g,,
make_dirprod (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr1Commutes A f g)
  (binproduct_nat_trans_Pr2Commutes A f g)

    apply binproduct_nat_trans_univ_prop.
Defined.

End BinProduct_of_functors.

  apply functor_precat_binproduct_cone.
Defined.

End def_functor_pointwise_binprod.

Section BinProduct_of_functors_commutative.

· BinProductPr1 D (BD (G c) (F c))

· BinProduct_of_functors_commutes_data c' =
BinProduct_of_functors_commutes_data c
· # (BinProduct_of_functors C D BD G F) f

F, G: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧

· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C D BD G F c c' f

f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
BinProductOfArrows D (BD (F c') (G c'))
  (BD (F c) (G c)) (# F f) (# G f)
· BinProduct_of_functors_commutes_data c' =
BinProduct_of_functors_commutes_data c
· BinProductOfArrows D (BD (G c') (F c'))
    (BD (G c) (F c)) (# G f) (# F f)

· BinProductOfArrows D (BD (G c') (F c'))
    (BD (G c) (F c)) (# G f) (# F f)

?b =

· BinProductOfArrows D (BD (G c') (F c'))
    (BD (G c) (F c)) (# G f) (# F f)

Defined.

End BinProduct_of_functors_commutative.


Section PairNatTrans.
  Context {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
          {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {G₁ G₂ G₃ : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
          (H : BinProducts C₃)
          (η₁ : F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂)
          (η₂ : F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃).

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
nat_trans_data (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
nat_trans_data (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G₁) x,
(F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃) x ⟧

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G₁) x, G₂ (F x) ⟧
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G₁) x, G₃ (F x) ⟧

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G₁) x, G₂ (F x) ⟧
 exact (η₁ x).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (F ∙ G₁) x, G₃ (F x) ⟧
 exact (η₂ x).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
is_nat_trans (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)
  pair_nat_trans_data

H: BinProducts C₃

  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)

η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# G₁ (# F f) · pair_nat_trans_data y =
pair_nat_trans_data x
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃ (F x) (F y)
    (# F f)

  (# G₁ (# F f) · η₁ y) (# G₁ (# F f) · η₂ y) = ?Goal

η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

q:= pr2 η₂ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₂ y = pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)
# G₁ (# F f) · η₂ y = ?t2

      exact q.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃

η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 η₁ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₁ y = pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)
q:= pr2 η₂ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₂ y = pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)
BinProductArrow C₃ (H (G₂ (F y)) (G₃ (F y)))
  (# G₁ (# F f) · η₁ y) (pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)) =
pair_nat_trans_data x
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃ (F x) (F y)
    (# F f)

H: BinProducts C₃

η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (# G₁ (# F f) · η₁ y) (pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)) =

H: BinProducts C₃

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃ (F x) (F y)

G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃

η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 η₁ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₁ y = pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)
q:= pr2 η₂ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₂ y = pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)
BinProductArrow C₃ (H (G₂ (F y)) (G₃ (F y)))
  (# G₁ (# F f) · η₁ y) (pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)) =
?Goal

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 η₁ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₁ y = pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)
q:= pr2 η₂ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₂ y = pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)
# G₁ (# F f) · η₁ y = ?y'

      exact p.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 η₁ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₁ y = pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)
q:= pr2 η₂ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₂ y = pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)
BinProductArrow C₃ (H (G₂ (F y)) (G₃ (F y)))
  (pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)) (pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)) =
pair_nat_trans_data x
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃ (F x) (F y)
    (# F f)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= pr2 η₁ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₁ y = pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)
q:= pr2 η₂ x y f: # G₁ (# F f) · pr1 η₂ y = pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)
BinProductArrow C₃ (H (G₂ (F y)) (G₃ (F y)))
  (pr1 η₁ x · # G₂ (# F f)) (pr1 η₂ x · # G₃ (# F f)) =
pair_nat_trans_data x
· BinProductArrow C₃ (H (G₂ (F y)) (G₃ (F y)))
    (pr121 (H (G₂ (F x)) (G₃ (F x))) · # G₂ (# F f))
    (pr221 (H (G₂ (F x)) (G₃ (F x))) · # G₃ (# F f))

    exact (!(postcompWithBinProductArrow _ _ _ _ _ _ _)).
  Qed.

G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃
