nat_trans_data (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
is_nat_trans (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃) ?t

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
nat_trans_data (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)
 exact pair_nat_trans_data.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: BinProducts C₃
η₁: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
η₂: F ∙ G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₃
is_nat_trans (F ∙ G₁)
  (F ∙ BinProduct_of_functors C₂ C₃ H G₂ G₃)
  pair_nat_trans_data
 exact pair_nat_trans_is_nat_trans.
  Defined.
End PairNatTrans.

(** ** Construction of BinProduct from an isomorphism to BinProduct. *)
Section BinProductFromIso.

  Context (C : category).

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
· (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
  · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
· (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
  · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
· (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
· (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
· (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g
· (inv_from_iso i · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP)) = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g
· (inv_from_iso i · i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g
· (identity BP · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · BinProductPr1 C BP = f

      apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · inv_from_iso i
· (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g
· (inv_from_iso i · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP)) = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g
· (inv_from_iso i · i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g
· (identity BP · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C BP f g · BinProductPr2 C BP = g

      apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 = BinProductArrow C BP f g · iso_inv_from_iso i

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 = BinProductArrow C BP f g · iso_inv_from_iso i

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i =
BinProductArrow C BP f g · iso_inv_from_iso i · i

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i =
BinProductArrow C BP f g · (iso_inv_from_iso i · i)
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i =
BinProductArrow C BP f g · (inv_from_iso i · i)
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i = BinProductArrow C BP f g · identity BP
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i = BinProductArrow C BP f g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i · BinProductPr1 C BP = f
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i · BinProductPr2 C BP = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i · BinProductPr1 C BP = f
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 apply (dirprod_pr1 T).
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · i · BinProductPr2 C BP = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
y0: C ⟦ w, z ⟧
T: y0 · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
y0 · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g
 apply (dirprod_pr2 T).
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
isBinProduct C x y z (i · BinProductPr1 C BP)
  (i · BinProductPr2 C BP)

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
isBinProduct C x y z (i · BinProductPr1 C BP)
  (i · BinProductPr2 C BP)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
fg · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
× fg · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ w, z ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
 t · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 × t · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g) ?x
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
    t · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
    × t · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g) y0)
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
 t · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 × t · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g) y0 → y0 = ?x

    (* Arrow *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ w, z ⟧
 exact ((BinProductArrow C BP f g) · (iso_inv_from_iso i)).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ t : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
 t · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 × t · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g)
  (BinProductArrow C BP f g · iso_inv_from_iso i)
 abstract (exact (iso_to_isBinProduct_comm BP i w f g)).
    (* Equality of equalities of morphisms. *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
    t · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
    × t · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g) y0)
 abstract (intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply C).
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
BP: BinProduct C x y
i: iso z BP
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∏ y0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ w, z ⟧,
 t · (i · BinProductPr1 C BP) = f
 × t · (i · BinProductPr2 C BP) = g) y0
→ y0 = BinProductArrow C BP f g · iso_inv_from_iso i
 abstract (intros y0 T; exact (iso_to_isBinProduct_unique BP i w f g y0 T)).
  Defined.

  Definition iso_to_BinProduct {x y z : C} (BP : BinProduct C x y)
             (i : iso z (BinProductObject C BP)) :
    BinProduct C x y := make_BinProduct C _ _ z
                                              (i · (BinProductPr1 C BP))
                                              (i · (BinProductPr2 C BP))
                                              (iso_to_isBinProduct BP i).

End BinProductFromIso.

(** ** Equivalent universal property: [(C --> A) × (C --> B) ≃ (C --> A × B)]

 Compare to [weqfuntoprodtoprod].
 *)

Section EquivalentDefinition.
  Context {C : category} {c d p : ob C} (p1 : p --> c) (p2 : p --> d).

  Definition postcomp_with_projections (a : ob C) (f : a --> p) :
    (a --> c) × (a --> d) := make_dirprod (f · p1)  (f · p2).

  Definition isBinProduct' : UU := ∏ a : ob C, isweq (postcomp_with_projections a).

  Definition isBinProduct'_weq (is : isBinProduct') :
    ∏ a, (a --> p) ≃ (a --> c) × (a --> d) :=
    λ a, make_weq (postcomp_with_projections a) (is a).

  
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBinProduct' → isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2

  
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBinProduct' → isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, fg · p1 = f × fg · p2 = g

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
hfiber (isBinProduct'_weq isBP' a) (make_dirprod f g)
≃ (∑ fg : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, fg · p1 = f × fg · p2 = g)
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
iscontr
  (hfiber (isBinProduct'_weq isBP' a)
     (make_dirprod f g))

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
hfiber (isBinProduct'_weq isBP' a) (make_dirprod f g)
≃ (∑ fg : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, fg · p1 = f × fg · p2 = g)
 
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C ⟦ a, p ⟧
postcomp_with_projections a x = make_dirprod f g
≃ x · p1 = f × x · p2 = g

      
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C ⟦ a, p ⟧
make_dirprod (x · p1) (x · p2) = make_dirprod f g
≃ x · p1 = f × x · p2 = g

      apply pathsdirprodweq.
    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP': isBinProduct'
a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
iscontr
  (hfiber (isBinProduct'_weq isBP' a)
     (make_dirprod f g))
 apply weqproperty.
  Defined.

  
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2 → isBinProduct'

  
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2 → isBinProduct'

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
iscontr (hfiber (postcomp_with_projections a) fg)

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∃! x : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, make_dirprod (x · p1) (x · p2) = fg

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
(∑ u : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, u · p1 = pr1 fg × u · p2 = pr2 fg)
≃ (∑ x : C ⟦ a, p ⟧,
   make_dirprod (x · p1) (x · p2) = fg)
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∃! u : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, u · p1 = pr1 fg × u · p2 = pr2 fg

    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
(∑ u : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, u · p1 = pr1 fg × u · p2 = pr2 fg)
≃ (∑ x : C ⟦ a, p ⟧,
   make_dirprod (x · p1) (x · p2) = fg)
 
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: C ⟦ a, p ⟧
x · p1 = pr1 fg × x · p2 = pr2 fg
≃ make_dirprod (x · p1) (x · p2) = fg

      apply invweq, pathsdirprodweq.
    
C: category
c, d, p: C
p1: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
p2: C ⟦ p, d ⟧
isBP: isBinProduct C c d p p1 p2
a: C
fg: C ⟦ a, c ⟧ × C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∃! u : C ⟦ a, p ⟧, u · p1 = pr1 fg × u · p2 = pr2 fg
 exact (isBP a (pr1 fg) (pr2 fg)). (* apply universal property *)
  Defined.

  (* TODO: prove that [isBinProduct'_to_isBinProduct] is an equivalence *)

End EquivalentDefinition.

(** Match non-implicit arguments of [isBinProduct] *)
Arguments isBinProduct' _ _ _ _ _ : clear implicits.

(** ** Terminal object as the unit (up to isomorphism) of binary products *)

(** [T × x ≅ x]*)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC T x) (TerminalArrow T x)
     (identity x))


C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC T x) (TerminalArrow T x)
     (identity x))

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr2 C (BC T x)
· BinProductArrow C (BC T x) (TerminalArrow T x)
    (identity x) = identity (BC T x)
× BinProductArrow C (BC T x) (TerminalArrow T x)
    (identity x) · BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) =
  identity x

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr2 C (BC T x)
· BinProductArrow C (BC T x) (TerminalArrow T x)
    (identity x) = identity (BC T x)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductArrow C (BC T x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · TerminalArrow T x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · identity x) =
identity (BC T x)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductArrow C (BC T x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · TerminalArrow T x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · identity x) =
BinProductArrow C (BC T x)
  (identity (BC T x) · BinProductPr1 C (BC T x))
  (identity (BC T x) · BinProductPr2 C (BC T x))

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · TerminalArrow T x =
identity (BC T x) · BinProductPr1 C (BC T x)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · identity x =
identity (BC T x) · BinProductPr2 C (BC T x)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · TerminalArrow T x =
identity (BC T x) · BinProductPr1 C (BC T x)
 apply TerminalArrowEq.
  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr2 C (BC T x) · identity x =
identity (BC T x) · BinProductPr2 C (BC T x)
 exact (id_right _ @ !id_left _).
Qed.


C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_z_isomorphism (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x))


C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_z_isomorphism (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x))

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, BC T x ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x)) ?g

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, BC T x ⟧
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, T ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, x ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, T ⟧

      apply TerminalArrow.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, x ⟧
 apply identity.
  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr2 C (BC T x))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC T x) (TerminalArrow T x)
     (identity x))
 apply terminal_binprod_unit_l_z_aux.
Defined.

(** [x × T ≅ x]*)

C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC x T) (identity x)
     (TerminalArrow T x))


C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC x T) (identity x)
     (TerminalArrow T x))

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr1 C (BC x T)
· BinProductArrow C (BC x T) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x) = identity (BC x T)
× BinProductArrow C (BC x T) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) =
  identity x

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr1 C (BC x T)
· BinProductArrow C (BC x T) (identity x)
    (TerminalArrow T x) = identity (BC x T)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductArrow C (BC x T)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · identity x)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · TerminalArrow T x) =
identity (BC x T)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductArrow C (BC x T)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · identity x)
  (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · TerminalArrow T x) =
BinProductArrow C (BC x T)
  (identity (BC x T) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x T))
  (identity (BC x T) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x T))

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · identity x =
identity (BC x T) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x T)
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · TerminalArrow T x =
identity (BC x T) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x T)

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · identity x =
identity (BC x T) · BinProductPr1 C (BC x T)
 exact (id_right _ @ !id_left _).
  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
BinProductPr1 C (BC x T) · TerminalArrow T x =
identity (BC x T) · BinProductPr2 C (BC x T)
 apply TerminalArrowEq.
Qed.


C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_z_isomorphism (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T))


C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_z_isomorphism (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T))

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, BC x T ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T)) ?g

  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, BC x T ⟧
 
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, x ⟧
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, T ⟧

    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, x ⟧
 apply identity.
    
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
C ⟦ x, T ⟧

      apply TerminalArrow.
  
C: category
T: Terminal C
BC: BinProducts C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat (BinProductPr1 C (BC x T))
  (BinProductArrow C (BC x T) (identity x)
     (TerminalArrow T x))
 apply terminal_binprod_unit_r_z_aux.
Defined.

Section BinProduct_of_functors_with_terminal.

Context (C D : category) (HD : BinProducts D) (TD : Terminal D) (F : functor C D).


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
c: C
D
⟦ BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
    (constant_functor C D TD) F c, F c ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr2 D (HD TD (F c))).
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
  terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
  terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) f
· terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data c' =
terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data c · # F f

  apply BinProductOfArrowsPr2.
Qed.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_z_iso
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_z_iso
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
  (constant_functor C D TD) F ⟹ F
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
  (constant_functor C D TD) F ⟹ F

HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D

  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F ?t

    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
 exact terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data.
    
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
     (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
  terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data
 exact terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_law.
  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
        (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_law)
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
c: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD
        (constant_functor C D TD) F) F
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_data
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_l_law c)
 apply terminal_binprod_unit_l_z.
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) F


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) F

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
c: C
D
⟦ BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
    (constant_functor C D TD) c, F c ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr1 D (HD (F c) TD)).
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) F
  terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) F
  terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data

  
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) f
· terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data c' =
terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data c · # F f

  apply BinProductOfArrowsPr1.
Qed.


C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_z_iso
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) F

TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
nat_z_iso
  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
     (constant_functor C D TD)) F

  (constant_functor C D TD) ⟹ F

HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F

 exact terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data.

TD: Terminal D

  terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data
 exact terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_law.

HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
        (constant_functor C D TD)) F
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_law)
 
C, D: category
HD: BinProducts D
TD: Terminal D
F: C ⟶ D
c: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (BinProduct_of_functors C D HD F
        (constant_functor C D TD)) F
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_data
     terminal_BinProduct_of_functors_unit_r_law c)
 apply terminal_binprod_unit_r_z.
Defined.

End BinProduct_of_functors_with_terminal.

(**
 In a univalent category, the type of binary products on a given diagram
 is a proposition
 *)

C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
prod₁ = prod₂


C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
prod₁ = prod₂

  
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧,
   isBinProduct C x y (pr1 x0) (pr12 x0) (pr22 x0))
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr1 prod₁ = pr1 prod₂

  
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧,
   isBinProduct C x y (pr1 x0) (pr12 x0) (pr22 x0))

    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
isaprop
  (isBinProduct C x y (pr1 x0) (pr12 x0) (pr22 x0))

    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
t: C
t0: C ⟦ t, x ⟧
t1: C ⟦ t, y ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : C ⟦ t, y ⟧,
    ∃! fg : C ⟦ t, pr1 x0 ⟧,
    fg · pr12 x0 = t0 × fg · pr22 x0 = t1) t1)

    use isapropiscontr.
  
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr1 prod₁ = pr1 prod₂

  
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr11 prod₁ = pr11 prod₂
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x ⟧ × C ⟦ x0, y ⟧) 
  ?p (pr21 prod₁) = pr21 prod₂

  
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr11 prod₁ = pr11 prod₂
 exact q.
  
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
transportf (λ x0 : C, C ⟦ x0, x ⟧ × C ⟦ x0, y ⟧) q
  (pr21 prod₁) = pr21 prod₂
 
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
make_dirprod
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ a, x ⟧) q (pr121 prod₁))
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ a, y ⟧) q (pr221 prod₁)) =
pr21 prod₂

    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
make_dirprod (idtoiso (! q) · pr121 prod₁)
  (idtoiso (! q) · pr221 prod₁) = pr21 prod₂

    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
make_dirprod
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso q) · pr121 prod₁)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso q) · pr221 prod₁) =
pr21 prod₂

    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr121 prod₁ = idtoiso q · pr121 prod₂
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr221 prod₁ = idtoiso q · pr221 prod₂

    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr121 prod₁ = idtoiso q · pr121 prod₂
 exact e₁.
    
C: category
x, y: C
prod₁, prod₂: BinProduct C x y
q: prod₁ = prod₂
e₁: BinProductPr1 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr1 C prod₂
e₂: BinProductPr2 C prod₁ =
idtoiso q · BinProductPr2 C prod₂
pr221 prod₁ = idtoiso q · pr221 prod₂
 exact e₂.
Qed.

Section IsoBinProduct.
  Context {C : category}
          {x y : C}
          (p₁ p₂ : BinProduct C x y).

  Let f : BinProductObject C p₁ --> BinProductObject C p₂
      := BinProductArrow _ _ (BinProductPr1 _ p₁) (BinProductPr2 _ p₁).

  Let g : BinProductObject C p₂ --> BinProductObject C p₁
      := BinProductArrow _ _ (BinProductPr1 _ p₂) (BinProductPr2 _ p₂).

  
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat f g

  
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat f g

    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
     (BinProductPr2 C p₁))
  (BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
     (BinProductPr2 C p₂))

    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₂) = identity p₁
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₁) = identity p₂

    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₂) = identity p₁
 
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₂) · BinProductPr1 C p₁ =
identity p₁ · BinProductPr1 C p₁
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₂) · BinProductPr2 C p₁ =
identity p₁ · BinProductPr2 C p₁

      
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₂) · BinProductPr1 C p₁ =
identity p₁ · BinProductPr1 C p₁
 
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· (BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
     (BinProductPr2 C p₂) · BinProductPr1 C p₁) =
identity p₁ · BinProductPr1 C p₁

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C p₁ = identity p₁ · BinProductPr1 C p₁

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C p₁ = BinProductPr1 C p₁

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₂) · BinProductPr2 C p₁ =
identity p₁ · BinProductPr2 C p₁
 
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁)
· (BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
     (BinProductPr2 C p₂) · BinProductPr2 C p₁) =
identity p₁ · BinProductPr2 C p₁

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C p₁ = identity p₁ · BinProductPr2 C p₁

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C p₁ = BinProductPr2 C p₁

        apply idpath.
    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₁) = identity p₂
 
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr1 C p₂ =
identity p₂ · BinProductPr1 C p₂
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr2 C p₂ =
identity p₂ · BinProductPr2 C p₂

      
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr1 C p₂ =
identity p₂ · BinProductPr1 C p₂
 
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· (BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
     (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr1 C p₂) =
identity p₂ · BinProductPr1 C p₂

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C p₂ = identity p₂ · BinProductPr1 C p₂

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C p₂ = BinProductPr1 C p₂

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr2 C p₂ =
identity p₂ · BinProductPr2 C p₂
 
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂)
· (BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
     (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr2 C p₂) =
identity p₂ · BinProductPr2 C p₂

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C p₂ = identity p₂ · BinProductPr2 C p₂

        
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C p₂ = BinProductPr2 C p₂

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
z_iso p₁ p₂

  
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
z_iso p₁ p₂

    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
 exact f.
    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
 exact g.
    
C: category
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
f:= BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁): C ⟦ p₁, p₂ ⟧
g:= BinProductArrow C p₁ (BinProductPr1 C p₂)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₂): C ⟦ p₂, p₁ ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat f g
 exact iso_between_BinProduct_eq.
  Defined.

End IsoBinProduct.


C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
isaprop (BinProduct C x y)


C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
isaprop (BinProduct C x y)

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
isProofIrrelevant (BinProduct C x y)

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
p₁ = p₂

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
p₁ = p₂
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr1 C p₁ = idtoiso ?q · BinProductPr1 C p₂
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr2 C p₁ = idtoiso ?q · BinProductPr2 C p₂

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
p₁ = p₂
 
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
z_iso p₁ p₂

    apply iso_between_BinProduct.
  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr1 C p₁ =
idtoiso (isotoid C HC (iso_between_BinProduct p₁ p₂))
· BinProductPr1 C p₂
 
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr1 C p₁ =
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr1 C p₂

    
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr1 C p₁ = BinProductPr1 C p₁

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr2 C p₁ =
idtoiso (isotoid C HC (iso_between_BinProduct p₁ p₂))
· BinProductPr2 C p₂
 
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr2 C p₁ =
BinProductArrow C p₂ (BinProductPr1 C p₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C p₁) · BinProductPr2 C p₂

    
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y: C
p₁, p₂: BinProduct C x y
BinProductPr2 C p₁ = BinProductPr2 C p₁

    apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 Products when the projections are equal
 *)

C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C x y z π₁' π₂'


C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
isBinProduct C x y z π₁' π₂'

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
isBinProduct C x y z π₁' π₂'

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, x ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, y ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ c, z ⟧, k · π₁' = f × k · π₂' = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∃! k : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, k · π₁' = f × k · π₂' = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop (∑ k : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, k · π₁' = f × k · π₂' = g)
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∑ k : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, k · π₁' = f × k · π₂' = g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop (∑ k : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, k · π₁' = f × k · π₂' = g)
 abstract
      (induction p₁, p₂ ;
       apply isapropifcontr ;
       apply H).
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∑ k : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, k · π₁' = f × k · π₂' = g
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ w, z ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
?pr1 · π₁' = f
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : ?pr1 · π₁' = f, ?pr1 · π₂' = g) ?pr10

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ w, z ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ P f g).
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C P f g · π₁' = f
 abstract
        (induction p₁ ;
         exact (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ P _ f g)).
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
π₁, π₁': C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p₁: π₁ = π₁'
π₂, π₂': C ⟦ z, y ⟧
p₂: π₂ = π₂'
H: isBinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂
P:= make_BinProduct C x y z π₁ π₂ H: BinProduct C x y
w: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : BinProductArrow C P f g · π₁' = f,
 BinProductArrow C P f g · π₂' = g)
  (isBinProduct_eq_arrow_subproof0 C x y z π₁ π₁' p₁
     π₂ H w f g)
 abstract
        (induction p₂ ;
         exact (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ P _ f g)).
Defined.

(**
 Products of isos
 *)
Section BinProductOfIsos.
  Context {C : category}
          {a b c d : C}
          (Pab : BinProduct C a b)
          (Pcd : BinProduct C c d)
          (f : z_iso a c)
          (g : z_iso b d).

  Let fg : BinProductObject _ Pab --> BinProductObject _ Pcd
    := BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ f g.

  Let fg_inv : BinProductObject _ Pcd --> BinProductObject _ Pab
    := BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g).

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat fg fg_inv

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat fg fg_inv

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd (inv_from_z_iso f)
    (inv_from_z_iso g) · BinProductPr1 C Pab =
identity Pab · BinProductPr1 C Pab
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd 
    (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g)
· BinProductPr2 C Pab =
identity Pab · BinProductPr2 C Pab
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd 
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g)
· BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· BinProductPr1 C Pcd =
identity Pcd · BinProductPr1 C Pcd
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd 
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g)
· BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· BinProductPr2 C Pcd =
identity Pcd · BinProductPr2 C Pcd

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd (inv_from_z_iso f)
    (inv_from_z_iso g) · BinProductPr1 C Pab =
identity Pab · BinProductPr1 C Pab

Pcd: BinProduct C c d

g: z_iso b d

  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd (inv_from_z_iso f)
     (inv_from_z_iso g) · BinProductPr1 C Pab) =
identity Pab · BinProductPr1 C Pab

BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g
· (BinProductPr1 C Pcd · inv_from_z_iso f) =
identity Pab · BinProductPr1 C Pab

· inv_from_z_iso f =
identity Pab · BinProductPr1 C Pab

BinProductPr1 C Pab · f · inv_from_z_iso f =

identity Pab · BinProductPr1 C Pab

BinProductPr2 C Pcd · identity d =
identity Pcd · BinProductPr2 C Pcd

Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d

  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
BinProductPr2 C Pcd = BinProductPr2 C Pcd

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
z_iso Pab Pcd

Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧

  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
z_iso Pab Pcd

Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
 exact fg.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
 exact fg_inv.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
Pab: BinProduct C a b
Pcd: BinProduct C c d
f: z_iso a c
g: z_iso b d
fg:= BinProductOfArrows C Pcd Pab f g: C ⟦ Pab, Pcd ⟧
fg_inv:= BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pcd
  (inv_from_z_iso f) (inv_from_z_iso g): C ⟦ Pcd, Pab ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat fg fg_inv
 exact binproduct_of_z_iso_inv.
  Defined.

End BinProductOfIsos.

(*
Definition of the "associative" z-isomorphism
*)
Section BinProduct_assoc_z_iso.

  Context {C : category}
          (P : BinProducts C)
          (a b c : C).

  Let Pbc := P b c.
  Let Pa_bc := P a (BinProductObject _ Pbc).
  Let Pab := P a b.
  Let Pab_c := P (BinProductObject _ Pab) c.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, Pab_c ⟧

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, Pab_c ⟧

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, Pab ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, c ⟧

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, Pab ⟧
 
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ a, a ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pbc, b ⟧

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ a, a ⟧
 exact (identity a).
      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pbc, b ⟧
 use BinProductPr1.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, c ⟧

Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b

Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c

Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b

  Defined.

C ⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact (identity c).
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_inverse_in_precat BinProduct_assoc_mor
  BinProduct_assoc_invmor

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
