  BinProduct_assoc_invmor

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProduct_assoc_mor · BinProduct_assoc_invmor =
identity Pa_bc
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProduct_assoc_invmor · BinProduct_assoc_mor =
identity Pab_c

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProduct_assoc_mor · BinProduct_assoc_invmor =
identity Pa_bc
 
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pab_c
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
  (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
    (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
       (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c)) =
identity Pa_bc

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pab_c
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
  (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
    (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
       (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductPr1 C Pa_bc =
identity Pa_bc · BinProductPr1 C Pa_bc
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pab_c
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc 
     (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
  (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
    (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
       (BinProductPr2 C Pab) 
       (identity c)) · BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc =
identity Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pab_c
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
  (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
    (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
       (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductPr1 C Pa_bc =
identity Pa_bc · BinProductPr1 C Pa_bc
 now rewrite
          id_left,
          assoc',
          BinProductPr1Commutes,
          assoc,
          BinProductPr1Commutes,
          BinProductOfArrowsPr1,
          id_right.
      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pab_c
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
     (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
  (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
    (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
       (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc =
identity Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc
 now rewrite
          id_left,
          assoc',
          BinProductPr2Commutes,
          postcompWithBinProductArrow,
          id_right,
          BinProductOfArrowsPr2,
          <-precompWithBinProductArrow,
          <-(id_left (BinProductPr1 C Pbc)),
          <-(id_left (BinProductPr2 C Pbc)),
          <-BinProductArrowEta,
          id_right.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProduct_assoc_invmor · BinProduct_assoc_mor =
identity Pab_c
 
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
  (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
     (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductArrow C Pab_c
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
       (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
    (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc) =
identity Pab_c

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
  (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
     (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductArrow C Pab_c
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
       (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
    (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductPr1 C Pab_c =
identity Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab_c
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
  (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
     (BinProductPr2 C Pab) 
     (identity c))
· BinProductArrow C Pab_c
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc 
       (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
    (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductPr2 C Pab_c =
identity Pab_c · BinProductPr2 C Pab_c

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
  (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
     (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductArrow C Pab_c
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
       (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
    (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductPr1 C Pab_c =
identity Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab_c
 now rewrite
          id_left,
          assoc',
          BinProductPr1Commutes,
          postcompWithBinProductArrow,
          id_right,
          BinProductOfArrowsPr1,
          <-precompWithBinProductArrow,
          <-(id_left (BinProductPr1 C Pab)),
          <-(id_left (BinProductPr2 C Pab)),
          <-BinProductArrowEta, id_right.
      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
BinProductArrow C Pa_bc
  (BinProductPr1 C Pab_c · BinProductPr1 C Pab)
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pab_c
     (BinProductPr2 C Pab) (identity c))
· BinProductArrow C Pab_c
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pa_bc (identity a)
       (BinProductPr1 C Pbc))
    (BinProductPr2 C Pa_bc · BinProductPr2 C Pbc)
· BinProductPr2 C Pab_c =
identity Pab_c · BinProductPr2 C Pab_c
 now rewrite
          id_left,
          assoc',
          BinProductPr2Commutes,
          assoc,
          BinProductPr2Commutes,
          BinProductOfArrowsPr2,
          id_right.
  Qed.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_z_isomorphism BinProduct_assoc_mor

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_z_isomorphism BinProduct_assoc_mor

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pab_c, Pa_bc ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_inverse_in_precat BinProduct_assoc_mor ?g

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pab_c, Pa_bc ⟧
 exact BinProduct_assoc_invmor.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_inverse_in_precat BinProduct_assoc_mor
  BinProduct_assoc_invmor
 exact BinProduct_assoc_is_inverse.
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
z_iso Pa_bc Pab_c

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
z_iso Pa_bc Pab_c

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, Pab_c ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_z_isomorphism ?f

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
C ⟦ Pa_bc, Pab_c ⟧
 exact BinProduct_assoc_mor.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, b, c: C
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
is_z_isomorphism BinProduct_assoc_mor
 exact BinProduct_assoc_is_z_iso.
  Defined.

End BinProduct_assoc_z_iso.

Section BinProduct_OfArrows_assoc.

  Context {C : category}
  (P : BinProducts C)
  {a a' b b' c c' : C}
  (f : C ⟦ a', a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b', b ⟧) (h : C ⟦ c', c ⟧).

  Let Pbc := P b c.
  Let Pa_bc := P a (BinProductObject _ Pbc).
  Let Pab := P a b.
  Let Pab_c := P (BinProductObject _ Pab) c.
  Let Pbc' := P b' c'.
  Let Pa_bc' := P a' (BinProductObject _ Pbc').
  Let Pab' := P a' b'.
  Let Pab_c' := P (BinProductObject _ Pab') c'.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProduct_assoc P a b c =
BinProduct_assoc P a' b' c'
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProduct_assoc P a b c =
BinProduct_assoc P a' b' c'
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· make_z_iso'
    (BinProductArrow C (P (P a b) c)
       (BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
          (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)))
       (BinProductPr2 C (P a (P b c))
        · BinProductPr2 C (P b c)))
    (BinProduct_assoc_is_z_iso P a b c) =
make_z_iso'
  (BinProductArrow C (P (P a' b') c')
     (BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
        (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c')))
     (BinProductPr2 C (P a' (P b' c'))
      · BinProductPr2 C (P b' c')))
  (BinProduct_assoc_is_z_iso P a' b' c')
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductArrow C (P (P a b) c)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
       (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (P a (P b c))
     · BinProductPr2 C (P b c)) =
BinProductArrow C (P (P a' b') c')
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
     (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c')))
  (BinProductPr2 C (P a' (P b' c'))
   · BinProductPr2 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductArrow C (P (P a b) c)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
       (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (P a (P b c))
     · BinProductPr2 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr1 C (P (P a b) c) =
BinProductArrow C (P (P a' b') c')
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
     (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c')))
  (BinProductPr2 C (P a' (P b' c'))
   · BinProductPr2 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h
· BinProductPr1 C (P (P a b) c)
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductArrow C (P (P a b) c)
    (BinProductOfArrows C 
       (P a b) (P a (P b c)) 
       (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (P a (P b c))
     · BinProductPr2 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr2 C (P (P a b) c) =
BinProductArrow C (P (P a' b') c')
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') 
     (P a' (P b' c')) (identity a')
     (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c')))
  (BinProductPr2 C (P a' (P b' c'))
   · BinProductPr2 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h
· BinProductPr2 C (P (P a b) c)

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductArrow C (P (P a b) c)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
       (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (P a (P b c))
     · BinProductPr2 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr1 C (P (P a b) c) =
BinProductArrow C (P (P a' b') c')
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
     (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c')))
  (BinProductPr2 C (P a' (P b' c'))
   · BinProductPr2 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h
· BinProductPr1 C (P (P a b) c)
 
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
    (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
  (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
    (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr1 C (P a b) =
BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
  (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g
· BinProductPr1 C (P a b)
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) 
    (P a (P b c)) (identity a)
    (BinProductPr1 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr2 C (P a b) =
BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') 
  (P a' (P b' c')) (identity a')
  (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g
· BinProductPr2 C (P a b)

      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
    (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr1 C (P a b) =
BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
  (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g
· BinProductPr1 C (P a b)
 now rewrite !assoc',
          !BinProductOfArrowsPr1,
          !assoc,
          !BinProductOfArrowsPr1,
          id_right, !assoc', id_left.
      
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
    (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr2 C (P a b) =
BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
  (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g
· BinProductPr2 C (P a b)
 now rewrite !assoc',
          !BinProductOfArrowsPr2,
          !assoc,
          !BinProductOfArrowsPr2,
          !assoc',
          !BinProductOfArrowsPr1.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
a, a', b, b', c, c': C
f: C ⟦ a', a ⟧
g: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
h: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
Pbc:= P b c: BinProduct C b c
Pa_bc:= P a Pbc: BinProduct C a Pbc
Pab:= P a b: BinProduct C a b
Pab_c:= P Pab c: BinProduct C Pab c
Pbc':= P b' c': BinProduct C b' c'
Pa_bc':= P a' Pbc': BinProduct C a' Pbc'
Pab':= P a' b': BinProduct C a' b'
Pab_c':= P Pab' c': BinProduct C Pab' c'
BinProductOfArrows C Pa_bc Pa_bc' f
  (BinProductOfArrows C Pbc Pbc' g h)
· BinProductArrow C (P (P a b) c)
    (BinProductOfArrows C (P a b) (P a (P b c))
       (identity a) (BinProductPr1 C (P b c)))
    (BinProductPr2 C (P a (P b c))
     · BinProductPr2 C (P b c))
· BinProductPr2 C (P (P a b) c) =
BinProductArrow C (P (P a' b') c')
  (BinProductOfArrows C (P a' b') (P a' (P b' c'))
     (identity a') (BinProductPr1 C (P b' c')))
  (BinProductPr2 C (P a' (P b' c'))
   · BinProductPr2 C (P b' c'))
· BinProductOfArrows C Pab_c Pab_c'
    (BinProductOfArrows C Pab Pab' f g) h
· BinProductPr2 C (P (P a b) c)
 now rewrite !assoc',
        !BinProductOfArrowsPr2, !BinProductPr2Commutes,
        !assoc,
        !BinProductOfArrowsPr2, !BinProductPr2Commutes,
        !assoc',
        !BinProductOfArrowsPr2.
  Qed.

End BinProduct_OfArrows_assoc.

Section diagonalMap.

  Context {C:category} (P : BinProducts C) (B:C).

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, P B B ⟧

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, P B B ⟧

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, B ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, B ⟧

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, B ⟧
 exact (identity B).
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, B ⟧
 exact (identity B).
  Defined.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
isMonic diagonalMap'

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
isMonic diagonalMap'

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
∏ (x : C) (g h : C ⟦ x, B ⟧),
g · diagonalMap' = h · diagonalMap' → g = h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B, x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, B ⟧
p: g · diagonalMap' = h · diagonalMap'
g = h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B, x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, B ⟧
p: g · diagonalMap' = h · diagonalMap'
p': (λ f : C ⟦ x, P B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (P B B)) (g · diagonalMap') =
(λ f : C ⟦ x, P B B ⟧,
 f · BinProductPr1 C (P B B)) (h · diagonalMap')
g = h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B, x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, B ⟧
p: g · diagonalMap' = h · diagonalMap'
p': g
· BinProductArrow C (P B B) (identity B)
    (identity B) · BinProductPr1 C (P B B) =
h
· BinProductArrow C (P B B) (identity B)
    (identity B) · BinProductPr1 C (P B B)
g = h

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B, x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, B ⟧
p: g · diagonalMap' = h · diagonalMap'
p': g = h
g = h

    exact p'.
  Qed.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
Monic C B (P B B)

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
Monic C B (P B B)

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, P B B ⟧
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
isMonic ?f

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
C ⟦ B, P B B ⟧
 exact diagonalMap'.
    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
B: C
isMonic diagonalMap'
 exact diagonalMap_isMonic.
  Defined.

End diagonalMap.

Section ProductFunctions.
  Context {C : category}
          (prodC : BinProducts C).

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C ⟦ prodC x y, prodC y x ⟧

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C ⟦ prodC x y, prodC y x ⟧

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C ⟦ prodC x y, y ⟧
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C ⟦ prodC x y, x ⟧

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C ⟦ prodC x y, y ⟧
 apply BinProductPr2.
    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
C ⟦ prodC x y, x ⟧
 apply BinProductPr1.
  Defined.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C
C ⟦ prodC x₁ y, prodC x₂ y ⟧

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C
C ⟦ prodC x₁ y, prodC x₂ y ⟧

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C
C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C
C ⟦ y, y ⟧

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C
C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
 exact f.
    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y: C
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  Defined.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
C ⟦ prodC x y₁, prodC x y₂ ⟧

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
C ⟦ prodC x y₁, prodC x y₂ ⟧

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
C ⟦ x, x ⟧
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
C ⟦ x, x ⟧
 exact (identity _).
    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
 exact g.
  Defined.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
prod_lwhisker f y₁ · prod_rwhisker x₂ g =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
prod_lwhisker f y₁ · prod_rwhisker x₂ g =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₁) (prodC x₁ y₁) f
  (identity y₁)
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₂ y₁)
    (identity x₂) g =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁)
  (f · identity x₂) (identity y₁ · g) =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g =
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
prod_swap x y · prod_swap y x = identity (prodC x y)

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
prod_swap x y · prod_swap y x = identity (prodC x y)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
prod_swap x y · prod_swap y x
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
prod_swap x y · prod_swap y x
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
prod_swap x y · prod_swap y x
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)
 
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· BinProductArrow C (prodC x y)
    (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x))
    (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x))
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· (BinProductArrow C (prodC x y)
     (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x))
     (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x))
   · BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· (BinProductArrow C (prodC x y)
     (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x))
     (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x))
   · BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)) =
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x) =
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y) =
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
prod_swap x y · prod_swap y x
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)
 
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· BinProductArrow C (prodC x y)
    (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x))
    (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x))
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· (BinProductArrow C (prodC x y)
     (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x))
     (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x))
   · BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)) =
identity (prodC x y) · BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· (BinProductArrow C (prodC x y)
     (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y x))
     (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x))
   · BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)) =
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductArrow C (prodC y x)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y))
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC y x) =
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y) =
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· prod_swap x₂ y₂ =
prod_swap x₁ y₁
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f

  
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· prod_swap x₂ y₂ =
prod_swap x₁ y₁
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· prod_swap x₂ y₂ · BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂) =
prod_swap x₁ y₁
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂)
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· prod_swap x₂ y₂ · BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂) =
prod_swap x₁ y₁
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂)

    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· prod_swap x₂ y₂ · BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂) =
prod_swap x₁ y₁
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂)
 
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· BinProductArrow C (prodC y₂ x₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· (BinProductArrow C (prodC y₂ x₂)
     (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
   · BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂)) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g
     f · BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂))

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₂ y₂) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g
     f · BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂))

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · g =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g
     f · BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₂ x₂))

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · g =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₁ x₁) · g)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · g =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC y₁ x₁) · g

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · g =
BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · g

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· prod_swap x₂ y₂ · BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂) =
prod_swap x₁ y₁
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂)
 
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· BinProductArrow C (prodC y₂ x₂)
    (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
    (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g f
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· (BinProductArrow C (prodC y₂ x₂)
     (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
     (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₂ y₂))
   · BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂)) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g
     f · BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂))

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₂ y₂) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (prodC y₂ x₂) (prodC y₁ x₁) g
     f · BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₂ x₂))

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C (prodC x₂ y₂) (prodC x₁ y₁) f g
· BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₂ y₂) =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₁ x₁) · f)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · f =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· (BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₁ x₁) · f)

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · f =
BinProductArrow C (prodC y₁ x₁)
  (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁))
· BinProductPr2 C (prodC y₁ x₁) · f

      
C: category
prodC: BinProducts C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · f =
BinProductPr1 C (prodC x₁ y₁) · f

      apply idpath.
  Qed.
End ProductFunctions.

(**
 Binary products are closed under iso
 *)

C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
isBinProduct C x y a₂ p₂ q₂


C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
isBinProduct C x y a₂ p₂ q₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧, fg · p₂ = h₁ × fg · q₂ = h₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧, fg · p₂ = h₁ × fg · q₂ = h₂)
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧, fg · p₂ = h₁ × fg · q₂ = h₂

  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧, fg · p₂ = h₁ × fg · q₂ = h₂)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property | ] ;
       use (cancel_z_iso _ _ f) ;
       use (BinProductArrowsEq _ _ _ (make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H)) ;
       [ cbn ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite <- !r₁ ;
         exact (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂))
       | cbn ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite <- !r₂ ;
         exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂)) ]).
  
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
∑ fg : C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧, fg · p₂ = h₁ × fg · q₂ = h₂
 
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
?pr1 · p₂ = h₁
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : ?pr1 · p₂ = h₁, ?pr1 · q₂ = h₂) ?pr10

    
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
C ⟦ w, a₂ ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ (make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H) h₁ h₂ · inv_from_z_iso f).
    
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
BinProductArrow C (make_BinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H)
  h₁ h₂ · inv_from_z_iso f · p₂ = h₁
 abstract
        (rewrite r₁ ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ;
         rewrite id_left ;
         apply BinProductPr1Commutes).
    
C: category
x, y, a₁, a₂: C
p₁: C ⟦ a₁, x ⟧
q₁: C ⟦ a₁, y ⟧
p₂: C ⟦ a₂, x ⟧
q₂: C ⟦ a₂, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁
f: z_iso a₂ a₁
r₁: p₂ = f · p₁
r₂: q₂ = f · q₁
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
(λ _ : BinProductArrow C
         (make_BinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H) h₁ h₂
       · inv_from_z_iso f · p₂ = h₁,
 BinProductArrow C (make_BinProduct C x y a₁ p₁ q₁ H)
   h₁ h₂ · inv_from_z_iso f · q₂ = h₂)
  (isBinProduct_z_iso_subproof0 C x y a₁ a₂ p₁ q₁ p₂ H
     f r₁ w h₁ h₂)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite r₂ ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite z_iso_after_z_iso_inv ;
         rewrite id_left ;
         apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ H))).
Defined.

Section BinProductsFromProducts.

Context {C : category}.
Context (c d : C).

Let binproduct_indexed_objects
  (i : bool)
  : C
  := if i then c else d.

Context (P : Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects).


C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
BinProduct C c d


C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
BinProduct C c d

  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
C
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
C ⟦ ?pr1, c ⟧
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
(λ _ : C ⟦ ?pr1, c ⟧, C ⟦ ?pr1, d ⟧) ?pr10
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
C ⟦ p', pr1 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) ⟧
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
?pr11 · pr12 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₁
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
(λ _ : ?pr11 · pr12 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₁,
 ?pr11 · pr22 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₂) 
  ?pr12
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑ fg : C ⟦ p', pr1 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) ⟧,
          fg · pr12 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₁
          × fg · pr22 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₂,
 ∏
 t : ∑ fg : C ⟦ p', pr1 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) ⟧,
     fg · pr12 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₁
     × fg · pr22 (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2) = π₂, 
 t = cntr) (?pr11,, ?pr12,, ?pr20)

  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
C
 exact (ProductObject _ _ P).
  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
C ⟦ P, c ⟧
 exact (ProductPr _ _ P true).
  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
(λ _ : C ⟦ P, c ⟧, C ⟦ P, d ⟧)
  (ProductPr bool C P true)
 exact (ProductPr _ _ P false).
  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
C ⟦ p',
pr1
  (P,,
   ProductPr bool C P true,, ProductPr bool C P false)
⟧
 
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
∏ i : bool, C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i ⟧

    
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
i: bool
C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i ⟧

    
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects true ⟧
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects false ⟧

    
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects true ⟧
 exact π₁.
    
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects false ⟧
 exact π₂.
  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
ProductArrow bool C P
  (λ i : bool,
   bool_rect
     (λ i0 : bool,
      C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧) π₁ π₂ i)
· pr12 (P,,
        ProductPr bool C P true,,
        ProductPr bool C P false) = π₁
 exact (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P _ _ true).
  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
(λ _ : ProductArrow bool C P
         (λ i : bool,
          bool_rect
            (λ i0 : bool,
             C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧)
            π₁ π₂ i)
       · pr12 (P,,
               ProductPr bool C P true,,
               ProductPr bool C P false) = π₁,
 ProductArrow bool C P
   (λ i : bool,
    bool_rect
      (λ i0 : bool,
       C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧) π₁ π₂
      i)
 · pr22 (P,,
         ProductPr bool C P true,,
         ProductPr bool C P false) = π₂)
  (ProductPrCommutes bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
     P p'
     (λ i : bool,
      bool_rect
        (λ i0 : bool,
         C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧) π₁
        π₂ i) true)
 exact (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P _ _ false).
  
C: category
c, d: C
binproduct_indexed_objects:= λ i : bool,
if i then c else d: bool → C
P: Product bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
p': C
π₁: C ⟦ p', c ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p', d ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑
          fg : C ⟦ p',
               pr1
                 (P,,
                  ProductPr bool C P true,,
                  ProductPr bool C P false) ⟧,
          fg
          · pr12 (P,,
                  ProductPr bool C P true,,
                  ProductPr bool C P false) = π₁
          × fg
            · pr22 (P,,
                    ProductPr bool C P true,,
                    ProductPr bool C P false) = π₂,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     fg : C ⟦ p',
          pr1
            (P,,
             ProductPr bool C P true,,
             ProductPr bool C P false) ⟧,
     fg
     · pr12 (P,,
             ProductPr bool C P true,,
             ProductPr bool C P false) = π₁
     × fg
       · pr22 (P,,
               ProductPr bool C P true,,
               ProductPr bool C P false) = π₂,
 t = cntr)
  (ProductArrow bool C P
     (λ i : bool,
      bool_rect
        (λ i0 : bool,
         C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧) π₁
        π₂ i),,
   ProductPrCommutes bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
     P p'
     (λ i : bool,
      bool_rect
        (λ i0 : bool,
         C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧) π₁
        π₂ i) true,,
   ProductPrCommutes bool C binproduct_indexed_objects
     P p'
     (λ i : bool,
      bool_rect
        (λ i0 : bool,
         C ⟦ p', binproduct_indexed_objects i0 ⟧) π₁
        π₂ i) false)
 abstract (
      intro t;
      apply subtypePath;
      [ intro;
        apply isapropdirprod;
        apply homset_property | ];
      apply (ProductArrowUnique _ _ _ P);
      intro i;
      induction i;
      [ exact (pr12 t)
      | exact (pr22 t) ]
    ).
Defined.

End BinProductsFromProducts.

Definition BinProducts_from_Products
  {C : category}
  (P : Products bool C)
  : BinProducts C
  := λ c d, BinProduct_from_Product c d (P _).

Section ProductsFromBinProducts.

  Context {C : category}.
  Context (BP : BinProducts C).
  Context {n : nat}.
  Context {c : C}.
  Context (P : Product (stn n) C (λ _, c)).
  Let stnweq := (weqdnicoprod n lastelement).

  Definition sn_power_object
    : C
    := BP P c.

  
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧

  
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧
 exact (
        BinProductPr1 _ _ ·
        ProductPr _ _ _ i'
      ).
    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧
 apply BinProductPr2.
  Defined.

  Section Arrow.

    Context (c' : C).
    Context (cone' : stn (S n) → C⟦c', c⟧).

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
C ⟦ c', P ⟧
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
C ⟦ c', c ⟧

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
C ⟦ c', P ⟧
 
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
(⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
C ⟦ c', c ⟧

        apply (cone' (stnweq (inl i))).
      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
C ⟦ c', c ⟧
 apply (cone' (stnweq (inr tt))).
    Defined.

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow · sn_power_projection i = cone' i

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow · sn_power_projection i = cone' i

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow
· sn_power_projection (stnweq (invmap stnweq i)) =
cone' (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow · sn_power_projection (stnweq (inl i')) =
cone' (stnweq (inl i'))
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
sn_power_arrow · sn_power_projection (stnweq (inr i')) =
cone' (stnweq (inr i'))

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow · sn_power_projection (stnweq (inl i')) =
cone' (stnweq (inl i'))
 
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C (BP P c)
     · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i')
    (λ _ : unit, BinProductPr2 C (BP P c)) (inl i') =
cone' (stnweq (inl i'))

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_arrow · BinProductPr1 C (BP P c)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i' =
cone' (stnweq (inl i'))

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, cone' (stnweq (inl i)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i' =
cone' (stnweq (inl i'))

        apply (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P).
      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
sn_power_arrow · sn_power_projection (stnweq (inr i')) =
cone' (stnweq (inr i'))
 
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
sn_power_arrow
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C ⟦ sn_power_object, c ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C (BP P c)
     · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i')
    (λ _ : unit, BinProductPr2 C (BP P c)) (inr i') =
cone' (stnweq (inr i'))

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
cone' (stnweq (inr tt)) = cone' (stnweq (inr i'))

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
i': unit
stnweq (inr tt) = stnweq (inr i')

        now apply stn_eq.
    Qed.

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
t = sn_power_arrow,, sn_power_arrow_commutes

BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ

P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
t = sn_power_arrow,, sn_power_arrow_commutes

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
isPredicate
  (λ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
   ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i)
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
pr1 t = sn_power_arrow

   f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i)

t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i

isaprop
  (∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
   x · sn_power_projection i = cone' i)

t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
x: C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧
∏ t : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
isaprop (x · sn_power_projection t = cone' t)

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C

t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
x: C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧
t0: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
isaprop (x · sn_power_projection t0 = cone' t0)

        apply homset_property.
      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)

f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
pr1 t = sn_power_arrow

      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn

t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
pr1 t · BinProductPr1 C (BP P c) =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, cone' (stnweq (inl i)))

∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,

· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i =

C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pr1 t
· (BinProductPr1 C (BP P c)
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i) =
pr1 t · sn_power_projection (stnweq (inl i))

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
sn_power_projection (stnweq (inl i)) =
BinProductPr1 C (BP P c) · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C P i

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ _)).
      
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)

∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (BP P c) =
cone' (stnweq (inr tt))
 
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
pr1 t · sn_power_projection (stnweq (inr tt)) =
pr1 t · BinProductPr2 C (BP P c)

        
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c', c ⟧
t: ∑ f : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
f · sn_power_projection i = cone' i
sn_power_projection (stnweq (inr tt)) =
BinProductPr2 C (BP P c)

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ _)).
    Qed.

  End Arrow.

  
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
isProduct (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c)
  sn_power_object sn_power_projection

BP: BinProducts C

isProduct (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c)
  sn_power_object sn_power_projection

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
∏ (c0 : C)
(f : ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
     C ⟦ c0, (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) i ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ c0, sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, k · sn_power_projection i = f i

cone': ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
C ⟦ c', (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) i ⟧
∃! k : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
k · sn_power_projection i = cone' i

t = ?x

c': C
cone': ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,

C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
C ⟦ c', (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) i ⟧
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
sn_power_arrow c' cone' · sn_power_projection i =
cone' i

      exact (sn_power_arrow_commutes c' cone').
    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
c': C
cone': ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
C ⟦ c', (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) i ⟧
∏
t : ∑ k : C ⟦ c', sn_power_object ⟧,
    ∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
    k · sn_power_projection i = cone' i,
t =
sn_power_arrow c' cone',,
sn_power_arrow_commutes c' cone'
 exact (sn_power_arrow_unique c' cone').
  Defined.

Product (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c)

P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
C ⟦ ?c, (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) i ⟧
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
isProduct (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C 
  (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) 
  ?c ?f

    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
C
 exact sn_power_object.
    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
∏ i : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn,
C ⟦ sn_power_object, (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c) i ⟧
 exact sn_power_projection.
    
C: category
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
c: C
P: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
stnweq:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit ≃ (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
isProduct (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c)
  sn_power_object sn_power_projection
 exact sn_power_is_product.
  Defined.

End ProductsFromBinProducts.


C: category
c: C
T: Terminal C
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)


C: category
c: C
T: Terminal C
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)

  
C: category
c: C
T: Terminal C
BP: BinProducts C
Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, c)
C: category
c: C
T: Terminal C
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
IHn: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
Product (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c)

  
C: category
c: C
T: Terminal C
BP: BinProducts C
Product (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, c)
 exact (Terminal_is_empty_product T _ weqstn0toempty).
  
C: category
c: C
T: Terminal C
BP: BinProducts C
n: ℕ
IHn: Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, c)
Product (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn, c)
 apply (n_power_to_sn_power BP IHn).
Defined.

Section BinProductOfIso.

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
isBinProduct C y1 y2 py f1 f2

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
isBinProduct C y1 y2 py f1 f2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
∏ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧),
∃! k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = f × k · f2 = g

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
∃! k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2

x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2

i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
isaprop (∑ k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2)

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2)

      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2

g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2
φ₁ = φ₂

x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C

i2: z_iso y2 x2

g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, x · f1 = g1 × x · f2 = g2)

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2

g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2
x: C ⟦ c, py ⟧
isaprop (x · f1 = g1 × x · f2 = g2)
 apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

 exact i.

pr1 φ₁ · f1 = pr1 φ₂ · f1

        exact (pr12 φ₁ @ ! pr12 φ₂).

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
∑ k : C ⟦ c, py ⟧, k · f1 = g1 × k · f2 = g2

      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
pr1 t · f1 = g1 × pr1 t · f2 = g2

i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2

     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
pr1 t · f1 = g1

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
pr1 t · f1 =
pr1 t · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px)
· inv_from_z_iso i1

x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2

     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,

g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =

· (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px
   · inv_from_z_iso i1)

        
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
f1 =
z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px
· inv_from_z_iso i1

        
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1

        exact pf1.
      
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2

t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
pr1 t · f2 = g2

     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
f2 =
z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px
· inv_from_z_iso i2

        
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2, py: C
px: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso y1 x1
i2: z_iso y2 x2
i: z_iso py px
f1: C ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
f2: C ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
pf1: i · BinProductPr1 C px = f1 · i1
pf2: i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2
c: C
g1: C ⟦ c, y1 ⟧
g2: C ⟦ c, y2 ⟧
t:= pr1
  (iso_to_isBinProduct C px (z_iso_to_iso i) c
     (g1 · i1) (g2 · i2)): ∑ fg : C ⟦ c, py ⟧,
fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr1 C px) =
g1 · i1
× fg · (z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px) =
  g2 · i2
z_iso_to_iso i · BinProductPr2 C px = f2 · i2

        exact pf2.
  Defined.

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
BinProduct C y1 y2

x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
BinProduct C y1 y2

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ ?c, y1 ⟧
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ ?c, y2 ⟧
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
isBinProduct C y1 y2 ?c ?f ?g

    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C
 exact p.
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ p, y1 ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr1 _ p · i1).
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
C ⟦ p, y2 ⟧
 exact (BinProductPr2 _ p · i2).
    
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p: BinProduct C x1 x2
i1: z_iso x1 y1
i2: z_iso x2 y2
isBinProduct C y1 y2 p (BinProductPr1 C p · i1)
  (BinProductPr2 C p · i2)
 use (isbinproduct_of_isos p (z_iso_inv i1) (z_iso_inv i2) (identity_z_iso p))
      ; rewrite id_left;
        rewrite assoc';
        rewrite z_iso_inv_after_z_iso;
        now rewrite id_right.
  Defined.

End BinProductOfIso.

Section HelperLemmas.

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ P x x₁, y ⟧
p: x₁ = x₂
transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ P x z, y ⟧) p f =
BinProductOfArrows C (P x x₁) (P x x₂) (identity x)
  (idtoiso (! p)) · f

  
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ P x x₁, y ⟧
p: x₁ = x₂
transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ P x z, y ⟧) p f =
BinProductOfArrows C (P x x₁) (P x x₂) (identity x)
  (idtoiso (! p)) · f

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, x₁: C
f: C ⟦ P x x₁, y ⟧
transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ P x z, y ⟧) (idpath x₁) f =
BinProductOfArrows C (P x x₁) (P x x₁) (identity x)
  (idtoiso (! idpath x₁)) · f

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, x₁: C
f: C ⟦ P x x₁, y ⟧
f =
BinProductOfArrows C (P x x₁) (P x x₁) (identity x)
  (identity x₁) · f

    
C: category
P: BinProducts C
x, y, x₁: C
f: C ⟦ P x x₁, y ⟧
f = identity (P x x₁) · f

    exact (! id_left _).
  Qed.

End HelperLemmas.
